title: FPS - OPTIMIZATION
description: This ModPack focuses on generating the highest possible fps (JAVA 22 IS NECESSARY TO RUN THIS)
body:
### **JAVA 22 IS NECESSARY TO RUN MODPACK**


This ModPack is built with one **clear goal: maximum performance**. Every mod, setting, and optimization is carefully selected to reduce CPU and GPU load, minimize memory usage, and eliminate unnecessary background rendering **with added some PvP enchancing mods**. Visual effects are streamlined, rendering is optimized, and **latency is kept as low as possible to ensure smooth, stable gameplay—even on lower-end hardware.**

**The result is a clean, lightweight experience that prioritizes raw FPS without compromising core gameplay, making it ideal for competitive play, PvP, and anyone who values responsiveness and consistency above visuals.**

If You Want To Ask Me Something You Can Contact With Me On Discord - #oreeste
